micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.general_idea: Update Maven properties to target Java 21 for source and release versions.
micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meet the target JDK requirement.

micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.general_idea: Explicitly set the maven-compiler-plugin release flag to 21.
micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not enforce Java 21 bytecode compatibility if it relies solely on properties not wired to the plugin configuration.
